title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 5.0A
sections: LUNAR EXTRAVAGANZA: YEAR OF THE DRAGON
paragraphs: February is a month to celebrate family, friends, and DRAGONS! Join us and celebrate how you want, with a new champion, with the new event, or on Arena. That’s right Arena is back! Sit down, grab a drink, and welcome to Patch 5.0A!
Reminder: content will be released throughout the patch.

Talon is the knife in the darkness, a merciless killer able to strike without warning and escape before any alarm is raised. He carved out a dangerous reputation on the brutal streets of Noxus, where he was forced to fight, kill, and steal to survive. Adopted by the notorious Du Couteau family, he now plies his deadly trade at the empire's command, assassinating enemy leaders, captains, and heroes… as well as any Noxian foolish enough to earn the scorn of their masters.
Talon will be released on February 23 at 00:01 UTC.

Happy Year of the Dragon! It’s a big year for our boy Aurelion Sol so be on the lookout for the Lunar Guardian event where you can get the Lunar Guardian skin for him, completely FREE! With the Lunar Extravaganza event, we will also be giving out 3 chromas. Log in, play a game, and send red pockets to your friends for a chance to get some poro energy or even a skin!
The Lunar Extravaganza event begins February 8 at 00:01 UTC
You asked for it, and we delivered. Arena is back (soon™).
Arena will be back on February 2 at 00:01 UTC
You can resist Crit based to your Crit rate (maximum 60%), receiving less damage (by 40%) while gaining Crit rate
Gain bonus Attack Damage according to your own Attack Speed (gain 2 AD per 0.1 Attack Speed)
We’ve buffed the shockwave range of Titanic hydra so it can be more effective in team fights.
We’re making it easier to gain charges on Heartsteel so it can have a bigger impact in gameplay.
We are optimizing the trigger conditions of Strategic Points to make it more difficult to trigger.

We’re increasing the weight of winning/losing games relative to the other factors. Game outcome will be a more significant determinant for future matchmaking accuracy. This should optimize matchmaking mechanism for edge cases.
